feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: Had grunts and machines coming at me from every angle and they almost had me… 😅 Too bad I am that nice 😏 #blerd #indiegames #gaming #fyp #vr
entry.content: Had grunts and machines coming at me from every angle and they almost had me… 😅 Too bad I am that nice 😏 #blerd #indiegames #gaming #fyp #vr

entry.title: I was gunning and dodging and got a bit too hyped. One good shotgun to the face brought me down a few pegs. 😅 Never a dull moment in Compound VR. Honestly need more games that look like it. #blerd #indiegames #vrgaming #funny #fyp
entry.content: I was gunning and dodging and got a bit too hyped. One good shotgun to the face brought me down a few pegs. 😅 Never a dull moment in Compound VR. Honestly need more games that look like it. #blerd #indiegames #vrgaming #funny #fyp

entry.title: Have you ever said a word so much its starts to sound funny? Well there is nothing funny about the cheeks I was tryna see… The word of the day is cheeks and I got in a police shootout and died over it. Cyberpunk 2077 is pretty fun… #blerd #cyberpunk2077 #
entry.content: Have you ever said a word so much its starts to sound funny? Well there is nothing funny about the cheeks I was tryna see… The word of the day is cheeks and I got in a police shootout and died over it. Cyberpunk 2077 is pretty fun… #blerd #cyberpunk2077 #

entry.title: Yeah... Had to add the Trauma Team from Cyberpunk 2077 to the kill list because they was doing way too much. Here I am helping this palm colored naked lady after she done had malware installed on her and I'm getting shoved. Trauma Team suppose to resolve
entry.content: Yeah... Had to add the Trauma Team from Cyberpunk 2077 to the kill list because they was doing way too much. Here I am helping this palm colored naked lady after she done had malware installed on her and I'm getting shoved. Trauma Team suppose to resolve

entry.title: A new week and a new month is upon us and that means we’re heading back to Night City! I already got an “unalive” list going and hopefully I won’t have to add anyone else to it. Just a fyi: Sometime this month we’ll be going on vr vacation to Raccoon City
entry.content: A new week and a new month is upon us and that means we’re heading back to Night City! I already got an “unalive” list going and hopefully I won’t have to add anyone else to it. Just a fyi: Sometime this month we’ll be going on vr vacation to Raccoon City

entry.title: Thought I posted this already but before I started streaming one day I sat in my chair and I guess my chair was tired of my BS and tired to take me out lmao. My back was hurting for a minute but I live. Kinda wish that it happened on stream because it wou
entry.content: Thought I posted this already but before I started streaming one day I sat in my chair and I guess my chair was tired of my BS and tired to take me out lmao. My back was hurting for a minute but I live. Kinda wish that it happened on stream because it wou

entry.title: Really enjoy that unarmed combat in Cyberpunk 2077! I know I’m not supposed to to talk about it but I heard there’s a fight club. Call me DHL because Imma bout to deliver these fist!
entry.content: Really enjoy that unarmed combat in Cyberpunk 2077! I know I’m not supposed to to talk about it but I heard there’s a fight club. Call me DHL because Imma bout to deliver these fist!

entry.title: Honestly, Big Joe is the main reason I had to start an “unalive” list to begin with. I ain’t like how he was waving his second amendment rights in my face… He bout to get amended he keep playing 😤
entry.content: Honestly, Big Joe is the main reason I had to start an “unalive” list to begin with. I ain’t like how he was waving his second amendment rights in my face… He bout to get amended he keep playing 😤

entry.title: I know it has beena hot minute since I've shown off my latest project, Force Network, so let's change that. Most of the work I've done in the last few months has all been under the hood but at least I can show off a new enemy in the works that's based on
entry.content: I know it has beena hot minute since I've shown off my latest project, Force Network, so let's change that. Most of the work I've done in the last few months has all been under the hood but at least I can show off a new enemy in the works that's based on

entry.title: Apparently I’ve been on the app for five years. I’ve done a lot in that time but I’m just getting started. Cheers to my continuing journey as a streaming game devving content creator!
entry.content: Apparently I’ve been on the app for five years. I’ve done a lot in that time but I’m just getting started. Cheers to my continuing journey as a streaming game devving content creator!

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?

entry.title: Pulled on this cyber psycho or whatever they are called and dude started jumping and swinging around. I had no idea I was playing Marvel Rivals or whatever. 😒 (Yes I did eventually peel their muffin cap back blue)
entry.content: Pulled on this cyber psycho or whatever they are called and dude started jumping and swinging around. I had no idea I was playing Marvel Rivals or whatever. 😒 (Yes I did eventually peel their muffin cap back blue)

entry.title: Of course, I'll do a post explaining in detail later, but I'm excited to show this off. Despite some kinks, the disciple's AI is functionally!!! I've been working on this all weekend, so I'm very happy! Also, I've started doing dev streams so whether you'
entry.content: Of course, I'll do a post explaining in detail later, but I'm excited to show this off. Despite some kinks, the disciple's AI is functionally!!! I've been working on this all weekend, so I'm very happy! Also, I've started doing dev streams so whether you'

entry.title: Had to share this bug I encounter while working on this enemy's AI. You've heard of infinite lives but have you heard of infinite deaths!!! I know how to fix it but it won't be fix before bed so please enjoy! I'm really happy with how Force Network is com
entry.content: Had to share this bug I encounter while working on this enemy's AI. You've heard of infinite lives but have you heard of infinite deaths!!! I know how to fix it but it won't be fix before bed so please enjoy! I'm really happy with how Force Network is com

entry.title: Now how you just gonna choke out your pops like that. I'd probably act as irreverent as I am in this clip if I was commiting a crime and then witness another seperate crime that I would then get framed for... Life come at you fast
entry.content: Now how you just gonna choke out your pops like that. I'd probably act as irreverent as I am in this clip if I was commiting a crime and then witness another seperate crime that I would then get framed for... Life come at you fast

entry.title: So here I am driving around Night City when the road is snatched from under me for a few seconds. Almost sent me to the upside down… It was scary 😅
entry.content: So here I am driving around Night City when the road is snatched from under me for a few seconds. Almost sent me to the upside down… It was scary 😅

entry.title: Here’s what 15 minutes of game development looks like in a little under 30 seconds. All I did was clean my code and make it work better. It doesn’t do anything you haven’t seen already 🤷🏾‍♂️😅 #gamedev #indiegames #godotengine
entry.content: Here’s what 15 minutes of game development looks like in a little under 30 seconds. All I did was clean my code and make it work better. It doesn’t do anything you haven’t seen already 🤷🏾‍♂️😅 #gamedev #indiegames #godotengine

entry.title: Imagine you take you baby momma to your fight and lose the money and the car. She is definitely leaving buddy after that. Then the game has the audacity to ask if I wanna let him keep the money and/or car… 🤨
entry.content: Imagine you take you baby momma to your fight and lose the money and the car. She is definitely leaving buddy after that. Then the game has the audacity to ask if I wanna let him keep the money and/or car… 🤨

entry.title: This went a lot differently in my head… I’m no good at stealth and they was on my head. It became a bit much 😅 However, when all is lost just remember to run around and scream… you’ll be just fine 😄
entry.content: This went a lot differently in my head… I’m no good at stealth and they was on my head. It became a bit much 😅 However, when all is lost just remember to run around and scream… you’ll be just fine 😄

entry.title: All that talking and not a piece of hands to be found but hey I got plenty of hands to spare. Dude should’ve went home and been a family guy 😤 Now I got his money and car but yall already saw that 😂
entry.content: All that talking and not a piece of hands to be found but hey I got plenty of hands to spare. Dude should’ve went home and been a family guy 😤 Now I got his money and car but yall already saw that 😂

entry.title: Have you ever choked someone so hard that the entire world freezes and glitches on you? No… Just me… I was pressing every button imaginable and yet I couldn’t get out of choke stance. At least the chokee was able to free themselves.
entry.content: Have you ever choked someone so hard that the entire world freezes and glitches on you? No… Just me… I was pressing every button imaginable and yet I couldn’t get out of choke stance. At least the chokee was able to free themselves.

entry.title: Finished most of the work with the golem and the robed disciple. Now I have two enemies for my awesome player character to fight. Working really hard to have something playable soon. In the meantime feel free to ask me anything you want about the projects
entry.content: Finished most of the work with the golem and the robed disciple. Now I have two enemies for my awesome player character to fight. Working really hard to have something playable soon. In the meantime feel free to ask me anything you want about the projects

entry.title: I think my favorite part of Cyberpunk 2077 is the fight club missions. I wouldn’t have expected the unarmed combat to be so fun but here I am… Delivering hands like Amazon Prime…
entry.content: I think my favorite part of Cyberpunk 2077 is the fight club missions. I wouldn’t have expected the unarmed combat to be so fun but here I am… Delivering hands like Amazon Prime…

entry.title: One of the inspiration for this project is a roguelike called POWDER and the way they handle potions. With they weekend upon us I thought it would be nice if the player could throw some bottles! Pour up and have a great weekend! More updates on Force Netw
entry.content: One of the inspiration for this project is a roguelike called POWDER and the way they handle potions. With they weekend upon us I thought it would be nice if the player could throw some bottles! Pour up and have a great weekend! More updates on Force Netw

entry.title: Chris!! How could you?! Just give me my daughter back!!! Resident Evil 8 VR is about to be a wild and crazy run… Mostly because I am a whole fool who has too much fun 😂
entry.content: Chris!! How could you?! Just give me my daughter back!!! Resident Evil 8 VR is about to be a wild and crazy run… Mostly because I am a whole fool who has too much fun 😂

entry.title: Resident Evil Village just gonna start the game by killing my wife and taking my daughter!!! I can't believe Chris switched up on me like this. Thought he was the homie... Whelp... Every Tuesday and Thursday around 3-4pm Eastern I'll be doing what I can t
entry.content: Resident Evil Village just gonna start the game by killing my wife and taking my daughter!!! I can't believe Chris switched up on me like this. Thought he was the homie... Whelp... Every Tuesday and Thursday around 3-4pm Eastern I'll be doing what I can t

entry.title: (Had to repost since TikTok just cut out the last part of the video) So I've been working on the potion throwing in my Force Network project and I finally got it working properly. Basically the potion would hurt anything in its path when it should only ef
entry.content: (Had to repost since TikTok just cut out the last part of the video) So I've been working on the potion throwing in my Force Network project and I finally got it working properly. Basically the potion would hurt anything in its path when it should only ef

entry.title: This is me and my daughter before my house was turned into swiss cheese. As you can see, I don’t know much of anything about babies but I am a doting father. I swear we’ll get my daughter back and avenge my wife!!! I try to stream every Tuesday and Thursd
entry.content: This is me and my daughter before my house was turned into swiss cheese. As you can see, I don’t know much of anything about babies but I am a doting father. I swear we’ll get my daughter back and avenge my wife!!! I try to stream every Tuesday and Thursd

entry.title: King the Asix has teamed up with Resident Evil Village to show you all the joys of child rearing. It's funny moments like this that make the experience so worth it. Children are the future... Good thing I got a loving family and won't have to chase my dau
entry.content: King the Asix has teamed up with Resident Evil Village to show you all the joys of child rearing. It's funny moments like this that make the experience so worth it. Children are the future... Good thing I got a loving family and won't have to chase my dau

entry.title: I'm really cooking with something up with Force Network. I opened up an old project to review and copy some old code, but I had a stroke of inspiration! I wonder how something like Azure Dreams and Battle Network would mesh together so that's what wer're
entry.content: I'm really cooking with something up with Force Network. I opened up an old project to review and copy some old code, but I had a stroke of inspiration! I wonder how something like Azure Dreams and Battle Network would mesh together so that's what wer're

entry.title: Something about knocking the bad guys into the water and watching them drown… #zeldatearsofthekingdom #zeldatotk #tearsofthekingdom #totk #zelda #fyp #viral #kingasix
entry.content: Something about knocking the bad guys into the water and watching them drown… #zeldatearsofthekingdom #zeldatotk #tearsofthekingdom #totk #zelda #fyp #viral #kingasix

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
